calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-20-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Luis G. Molina, Esq. appeared for and with the plaintiff Danny Udom, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Will E. Daniels.

After hearing the testimony and cosidering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1466-A Innes Ave. (lower unit), San Francisco, CA. 94124. The rental agreement is forfeited.
Past-Due Rent - $2,205.00.
Holdover damages $700.00
Attorney fees $1,500.00
Costs - $220.00
Total - $4,625.00

Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2010 Off Calendar
